originalTitle: Destiny 2: Monument of Triumph Update | Launch Trailer
content: Build your Monument of Triumph. Play new and updated content including Pantheon, Sparrow Racing League, Distortions, and new Triumph pursuits celebrating your Guardian’s journey across Destiny 2. New challenges, abilities, and rewards arrive for all Guardians on June 9, 2026. ⚪ https://bung.ie/destiny FOLLOW DESTINY: Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DestinyTheGame Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/destinythegame Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/destinythegame Discord: http://www.discord.gg/destinygame FOLLOW BUNGIE: Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Bungie/ Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/bungie Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bungie/ ⠀ ⠀ ⠀ ⠀ Dive into the free-to-play world of Destiny 2 to experience responsive first-person shooter combat, explore the mysteries of our solar system, and unleash elemental abilities against powerful enemies. Create your Guardian and collect unique weapons, armor, and gear to customize your look and playstyle. Experience Destiny 2’s cinematic story alone or with friends, join other Guardians for challenging co-op missions, or compete against them in a variety of PvP modes. Captured on PC. Some camera angles adjusted for trailer use. Content subject to change. Internet connection and online multiplayer subscription may be required. © 2026 Bungie, Inc. Destiny, the Destiny Logos, Bungie and the Bungie Logo are among the trademarks of Bungie, Inc. in the United States and other countries. Some content shown requires Rewards Pass or other additional purchases. Dates and content subject to change.
chineseContent: 建造你的胜利纪念碑。畅玩新的和更新的内容，包括万神殿、麻雀赛车联盟、扭曲和新的凯旋追求，庆祝您的守护者穿越命运 2 的旅程。所有守护者将于 2026 年 6 月 9 日迎来新的挑战、能力和奖励。⚪ https://bung.ie/destiny 关注命运：Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/DestinyTheGame Twitter：https://www.twitter.com/destinythegame Instagram： https://www.instagram.com/destinythegame Discord：http://www.discord.gg/destinygame 关注 BUNGIE： Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/Bungie/ Twitter：https://www.twitter.com/bungie Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/bungie/ ⠀ ⠀ ⠀ ⠀ 潜入《命运 2》的免费游戏世界，体验响应式第一人称射击战斗、探索探索太阳系的奥秘，并释放元素能力来对抗强大的敌人。创建你的守护者并收集独特的武器、盔甲和装备来定制你的外观和游戏风格。独自或与朋友一起体验《命运 2》的电影故事，与其他守护者一起执行具有挑战性的合作任务，或在各种 PvP 模式中与他们竞争。在电脑上捕获。调整了一些摄像机角度以适合​​拖车使用。内容可能会发生变化。可能需要互联网连接和在线多人游戏订阅。 © 2026 Bungie, Inc.。Destiny、Destiny 徽标、Bungie 和 Bungie 徽标是 Bungie, Inc. 在美国和其他国家/地区的商标。显示的某些内容需要奖励通行证或其他额外购买。日期和内容可能会发生变化。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
